title: ddwrt provider
description: Native OpenTofu/Terraform provider for DD-WRT routers driven over SSH (Dropbear). Manages NVRAM generically (ddwrt_nvram resource + data source) with a manage-declared-only subset model so declared keys import to 0-diff and unmanaged NVRAM is never touched. DD-WRT has no clean REST API; SSH chosen over HTTP/apply.cgi because the HTTP read path is unworkable for a generic resource. DD-WRT service control differs from Tomato/Asuswrt (no `service <svc> restart`, no `restart_<svc>`): a named service is cycled via a configurable restart_command (default stopservice/startservice) and `*`/`all`/`rc` run a full `rc restart`.

phases.title: Core (generic NVRAM over SSH)
phases.exit_criteria: Builds, vets, tests; one resource + data source manage any NVRAM variable to 0-diff.

items.feature: SSH transport over the system ssh binary (os/exec, BatchMode, ConnectTimeout): nvram get/set/unset/commit, nvram show, service apply; unset-vs-set-empty disambiguation; shell-quoting. No new Go deps.
DD-WRT service control: configurable restart_command template (default `stopservice {service}; startservice {service}`); `*`/`all`/`rc` short-circuit to full `rc restart`; empty restart is a no-op.
ddwrt_nvram resource (CRUD + ImportState): set declared keys -> commit -> restart; snapshot prior values; restore-on-destroy (set-or-unset); add/drop keys handled in Update.
Manage-declared-only drift: nvramSubsetMatches plan modifier (declared keys match device -> 0-diff; unmanaged NVRAM never clobbered).
ddwrt_nvram data source (read single key value+present, or whole `nvram show`).
Unit tests: subset matcher, key-map/snapshot encode/decode, snapEntry, keyID, splitKeys, splitHostPort, shellQuote, connectTimeout, restartCommand construction, fullRestartService.

phases.title: Validate against live DD-WRT
phases.exit_criteria: A lab DD-WRT imports to 0-diff through the provider.

items.feature: make check green (gofmt+vet+test+build); pushed to main; pre-commit gate passes.
Live import to 0-diff against a lab DD-WRT. BLOCKED: the DD-WRT lab VM is powered off (change-windowed). Powering it on is out of scope. Skipped.
Acceptance tests (TF_ACC) against a throwaway/lab DD-WRT.

phases.title: Ergonomics + release
phases.exit_criteria: Optional typed sugar; CI; registry publish.

items.feature: Typed sugar resources (lan, wan, dhcp, wifi) over the generic ddwrt_nvram core, if an ergonomics need emerges.
CI (build/vet/test) + GoReleaser + registry publish + docs gen.
